job_title: View job: Scientist 2-Spatial Biology and Biophysics
job_description:
• 3+ years of relevant experience in situ hybridization, imaging and spatial techniques, preferably in the Biotechnology industry.
• Strong analytical background Strong organizational skills.
• Strong written and oral communication skills.
• Strong troubleshooting and problem solving skills.
• Experience with the 10x Genomics Xenium platform is a plus.
• Skills in image analysis are a plus.
• PhD in Molecular Biology, Biophysics, Physical Chemistry or related field.
• Proven ability to design novel molecular biology assay schemes, as evidenced by peer-reviewed publications or published patents.

job_title: Product Owner, CQP driven sales process development
job_description: • Customer events News & media Who we are Innovation Careers Sustainability Supplying EEO and Affirmative Action.

• Providing Export Control (ECCN/ECN) and Customs (HTS/HS tariff code, Preferential/Non Preferential Origin) classification of products, software, and/or technologies as part of new product introduction cycleManaging and updating master data for products, technologies, and software, including product description, and/or supporting customs declarants with product information required for master data management and entriesSupporting relevant teams (Procurement, Order Handling, R&D, Customs, Sales etc…) regarding product classification-related inquiries or issuesReviewing and applying relevant changes in the regulatory framework related to product classificationWhen working in a local Business, the PCE has a functional reporting line to the Local Trade Compliance Officer, and occasionally may be approached by the country trade compliance officer to support the classification of an item on ad hoc basis You have good knowledge or a strong willingness to learn about ELSP products, software, technologies, and classification processes.
• You have solid skills in MS Office and SAP, and you are well organized, precise, and diligent in data management and documentation.
• You have good knowledge about customs and export control regulations.
• You are business-oriented, proactive, flexible, and able to work independently while remaining a strong team player.
• You are at ease communicating in Italian and English.
